videos.title: My First Year as a Bookstore Owner
videos.description:
🌙 Pre-order my new book (self-published) The Woods and Wisp🐇✨📗:  https://www.etsy.com/shop/TheCottageFairyArt ❤️

🍁 You can follow along on the journey more closely on my Patreon:   / bythecottagefairy  

📚 If you are desiring to purchase some books, please consider supporting our little bookstore and we will add a little thank you note with your order (we are happy to wrap your order as well, if you request it with your order! US only due to high shipping costs, so sorry!): https://www.trailsen
